532 O0400E1_PSYCH_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400E1_PSYCH_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400E1 Psychological Therapy Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that psychological therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
